name: director
description: Project Director — consume Milestone Reviewer report in the milestone-gate template and issue Proceed / Iterate / Pivot / Abort verdict; write result to artifact
promptTemplate:
Execute the milestone verdict per the director directive.

Milestone Reviewer's report (previous step):
{{previousOutput}}

---

Original task / context:
{{input}}

---

Reviewer's full artifact is at {{artifactPath}} — read it end-to-end first. Write your analysis and the final `Verdict:` line back to the same artifact. Artifact MUST agree on verdict word and top reasons.
